name: Rachel Turner
learned: Rachel Turner is Margaret's best friend and a local schoolteacher. She values logic and often approaches situations with skepticism. While she is supportive of Margaret, she sometimes acts as a voice of reason against fanciful notions like treasure hunts.
currently: Rachel is currently engaged in her teaching duties but frequently catches up with Margaret to discuss the treasure letters. She is concerned for her friend's safety and encourages her to remain grounded in reality while also enjoying the adventure.
lifestyle: Rachel has a busy lifestyle with her teaching responsibilities, which include planning lessons and grading papers. She enjoys evenings filled with family time and occasional outings with Margaret. She believes in balancing work and leisure effectively.
